# Airclap

> Free cross-platform file transfer tool for Mac, iOS, Windows, and Android devices over local network. No internet required, no file size limits, ultra-fast LAN transfers.

## Product Info
- [Homepage](https://airclap.app): Product overview and download links
- [App Store](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/airclap/id6467128147): iOS and macOS versions
- [Google Play](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=tech.gentleflow.airclap.pro): Android version
- [Microsoft Store](https://apps.microsoft.com/detail/9n19c4qdkr6d): Windows version

## Key Features
- Cross-platform file transfer (macOS, iOS, Windows, Android)
- LAN-based transfers — no internet connection needed
- Drag and drop interface
- No file size limits
- Text content sharing support
- Multiple file format support with clear previews

## Community & Recognition
- [Product Hunt](https://www.producthunt.com/products/airclap): #1 Product of the Day
